title: Samantha API Rename — /v1/api/* → /samantha/v1/*
scope:
Pure URL rename of the entire API surface. The Go router mount point moves from /v1 to /samantha/v1, and the redundant /api/ segment is dropped from all sub-route strings. Unversioned infra routes (/api/env, /api/status/pipeline, /api/env/switch) are hoisted to the root. The v2 sub-routes currently nested inside the v1 block (/api/v2/work-items, /api/v2/timeboxes/sprints) are extracted into a new top-level /samantha/v2 block.

On the frontend, API_BASE in app/lib/api.ts changes from + "/v1" to + "/samantha/v1", and all ~40 api("/api/…") call sites have their path strings stripped of the /api/ prefix. The OpenAPI spec server URLs and path entries are updated to match. No logic, middleware, auth, or handler code changes.
value: Establishes samantha as the permanent, human-readable service identifier in every API URL — making it unambiguous which service is being called when multiple services or external clients exist. Drops the redundant /api/ segment inside an already-versioned prefix. Sets the correct URL shape before any external client adoption occurs, making future graceful version retirement (Deprecation + Sunset headers, 410 Gone) straightforward to implement.
implementation_plan: Task 1: Rename Go router — /v1 block → /samantha/v1, drop /api/ from ~32 sub-route strings, hoist infra routes to root, extract v2 sub-routes to new /samantha/v2 block.
Task 2: Update frontend api() base — API_BASE in app/lib/api.ts: '+ /v1' → '+ /samantha/v1'; update 2 apiInfra call sites in EnvBadge.tsx (/api/env → /env, /api/status/pipeline → /status/pipeline).
Task 3: Bulk-rename ~40 api('/api/…') call sites — strip /api/ prefix from every path string passed to api(); update 3 hardcoded path constants in app/(user)/portfolio-model/adoptionConstants.ts.
Task 4: Verify direct-fetch files — useRealtimeSubscription.ts (WebSocket /ws unchanged), useTopologyHandoffs.ts, AdoptionOverlay.tsx — confirm no stale /v1/api/ or /api/ references remain.
Task 5: Update openapi.yaml — server URL + strip /api/ from all ~106 path entries.
Task 6: E2E smoke test — confirm /samantha/v1/auth/login returns 200, old /v1/api/ paths return 404, /healthz unchanged.
areas_impacted: API: backend/cmd/server/main.go — router mount points, ~32 sub-route strings, infra route hoisting, v2 block extraction
Frontend: app/lib/api.ts API_BASE, ~40 api() call sites, 2 apiInfra call sites, 3 adoptionConstants.ts path literals
Docs: openapi.yaml server URLs + ~106 path entries; api-reference/docs/rest-api/ MDX path strings
feature_list: Go router: /api/ prefix dropped from all ~32 sub-route strings inside the block
Go router: /samantha/v2 block extracted for work-items v2 and timeboxes/sprints v2
Frontend call sites: api('/api/work-items') → api('/work-items') (all ~40 sites)
openapi.yaml: server URL + path entries updated

acceptance_criteria.proven_by: curl smoke test against running backend
curl smoke test confirming old paths are gone

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Frontend work-items page loads with no network errors
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Browser devtools Network tab — all API calls resolve 2xx

risks.risk: Stale api('/api/…') call site missed in bulk rename — silent 404 in browser
risks.mitigation: grep for '/api/' in app/ after rename; confirm zero hits before smoke test

risks.risk: Cookie Path on rt cookie still references /v1/api/auth — refresh logout regresses
risks.mitigation: auth/handler.go setRefreshCookie Path must be updated to /samantha/v1/auth in Task 1

risks.risk: openapi.yaml has duplicate /api/ prefix removal leaving malformed paths
risks.mitigation: sed dry-run review before apply; validate with openapi-spec-validator
